name: Haichao (Hychao) Wang
title: Master Student
focus: Video Understanding and Generation, Computational Video, Efficiency, Machine Learning
about: I am a master's student in Data Science and Information Technology at Tsinghua University, advised by Prof. Yuxing Han. I received my bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Technology from Beijing Jiaotong University in 2023.
Currently, I am focusing on video understanding and generation systems, specifically on long video understanding, memory and generation.

My previous research focuses on computational video, including motion estimation and temporal redundancy to reduce computation in video models. During my undergraduate study, I worked on lightweight physiological signal analysis with knowledge distillation.
Feel free to contact me if you are interested in discussion or collaboration.

experience.title: Long Video Understanding and Memory System
experience.desc: Developing a long video understanding and memory system.

experience.title: Generative Human Motion Mimicking
experience.desc: Developed an algorithm using diffusion trajectory matching for controlled long-range motion generation.

experience.title: Efficient Video Computer Vision with Motion Estimation
experience.desc: Applied video motion estimation to accelerate video computer vision systems and proposed an efficient Bayer-data pipeline that removes ISP latency.

experience.title: Physiological Signal Classification and System Design
experience.org: Institute of Network Science and Intelligent System, BJTU
experience.desc: Proposed multi-level and spatial-temporal knowledge distillation frameworks for lightweight EEG and physiological signal classification.

education.advisor: Dr. Ziyu Jia & Prof. Jing Wang

awards: National Prize, National College Students' Innovation and Entrepreneurship Training Program
Second Prize, Beijing Undergraduate Mathematical Contest in Modeling
Second Prize, 11th Challenge Cup National Undergraduate Curricular Academic Science and Technology Works
